title: lasthenia californica subsp. californica
intro: Lasthenia californica subsp. californica, also known as California goldfields, is a rare annual flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lasthenia californica subsp. californica include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
